title: Sonu Nigam Concert: Traffic Restrictions Near IGI Stadium on March 28 – Check Roads to Avoid, Entry Routes Here
description: Delhi Traffic Police has issued an advisory with restrictions on IP Marg, Vikas Marg, and Ring Road from 4 PM to 11 PM on March 28 for Sonu Nigam's 'Satrangi Re' concert at Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium.
